=== CHUNK 1: chunk_001.txt ===
================================================================
FIND_EVIL — PIVOT REPORT
Generated: 2026-05-31T10:00:00Z
Summary: Confirmed C2 callback from powershell; process injection detected.
Counts: confirmed=1  inconclusive=1  rejected=2
================================================================

[CONFIRMED]
----------------------------------------------------------------
PID:      1234
PPID:     500
Image:    powershell.exe
Cmdline:  powershell -enc VwByAGkAdABlAC0ASABvAHMAdAAgACIASGVsbG8iAA==
Severity: CRITICAL
MITRE:    T1059.001 — PowerShell Execution, T1105 — Ingress Tool Transfer

Justification:
  Encoded PowerShell with download-cradle pattern detected (IEX + DownloadString).
  Established C2 connection to 185.220.101.44:4444. Process injected into
  child svchost. Strong corroboration across cmdline, network, and malfind.

Key Evidence:
  - L42: 1234  2  powershell.exe  "powershell -enc VwByAGkAdABlACIASGVsbG8iAA=="
  - L156: 1234 ESTABLISHED 192.168.1.100:54321 185.220.101.44:4444
  - L89: 1234 RWX region: 0x00400000-0x00410000 MZ shellcode pattern
----------------------------------------------------------------

[INCONCLUSIVE]
----------------------------------------------------------------
PID:      5678
PPID:     1234
Image:    cmd.exe
Cmdline:  cmd /c whoami > C:\Users\Public\out.txt
Severity: MEDIUM
MITRE:    T1057 — Process Discovery

Justification:
  cmd.exe spawned by the suspicious powershell.exe (PID 1234). Command line
  suggests reconnaissance (whoami). However, the output file was not found in
  pivot evidence, so full confirmation is not possible.

Key Evidence:
  - L201: 5678  1234  cmd.exe  "cmd /c whoami > C:\Users\Public\out.txt"
----------------------------------------------------------------
